faqs.question: What is RSCE?
faqs.answer: RSCE stands for Royal Society of Chemistry Education. We are dedicated to promoting chemistry education and supporting educators worldwide.

faqs.question: How do I become a member?
faqs.answer: To become a member, visit our membership page and fill out the registration form. We offer various membership levels to suit your needs.

faqs.question: What are your contact details?
faqs.answer: You can reach us at support@rsce.com or visit our website's contact page for phone numbers and office locations.

faqs.question: Do you offer educational resources?
faqs.answer: Yes! We provide a wide range of educational resources including lesson plans, videos, and interactive tools for chemistry education.

faqs.question: How can I access member benefits?
faqs.answer: Members can log in to their account on our website to access exclusive resources, discounts, and community forums.

faqs.question: Is there a student discount?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer special student membership rates. Please provide proof of enrollment when registering as a student.

faqs.question: How often do you update your content?
faqs.answer: We update our resources regularly, typically adding new materials monthly. Subscribe to our newsletter for the latest updates.

faqs.question: Can I cancel my membership?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can cancel your membership anytime from your account settings. Please note that cancellations take effect at the end of your billing cycle.
